items.claim: Patty Pimblett has a better chin than Benoit Saint-Denis.
items.quote: I think Patty's got a better chin. Honestly, I really do.

items.claim: Benoit Saint-Denis is frequently hurt and rocked in his fights.
items.quote: I've seen Ben Saint hurt quite a lot, man. You know, rocked a lot.

items.claim: Patty Pimblett is more likely to finish a fight from top position than Benoit Saint-Denis.
items.quote: I think Patty will do more damage or more likely to finish from top position than Benoir Saint Deni.

items.claim: Patty Pimblett returned from his last fight weighing 210 lbs.
Patty Pimblett's habit of gaining significant weight between fights hinders his career performance.
items.quote: It's probably hinders him a lot.

items.claim: Patty Pimblett was injured going into his fight against Justin Gaethje.
items.quote: apparently he was injured going into that fight. That's what he said in his own words.

items.claim: Cory Sandhagen fought with an injury during his fight against Rob Font.
items.quote: I think I think he got injured and he just did that.

items.claim: Mario Bautista has improved more than Cory Sandhagen since their 2019 fight.
items.quote: I do think Mario's improved a little bit more than Cory since then.
